biz_name: 商品カタログ参照フロー
route_summary: index.html → CatalogActionBean#viewMain/@DefaultHandler → (viewCategory) CatalogService#getProductListByCategory+getCategory → CategoryMapper/ProductMapper → CATEGORY/PRODUCT → Category.jsp → (viewProduct) CatalogService#getItemListByProduct → ItemMapper → ITEM/INVENTORY → Product.jsp → (viewItem) CatalogService#getItem → ItemMapper → Item.jsp
evidence: src/main/webapp/WEB-INF/web.xml:56-63 *.action→StripesDispatcher; CatalogActionBean.java:36 @SessionScope; CatalogActionBean.java:46 @SpringBean CatalogService; CategoryMapper.xml:26 SELECT CATEGORY; ProductMapper.xml:36 SELECT PRODUCT; ItemMapper.xml:26 SELECT ITEM/INVENTORY
note: Stripesフレームワーク設定駆動でURL→ActionBean解決 (web.xml ActionResolver.Packages=org.mybatis.jpetstore.web); Spring DIでCatalogServiceを注入; MyBatisでMapperインターフェース→XMLバインド。バッチ処理なし

route_summary: Cart.jsp stripes:link OrderActionBean#newOrderForm → セッション検証(AccountActionBean/CartActionBean) → Order#initOrder(Account,Cart) → NewOrderForm.jsp → OrderActionBean#newOrder → (配送先必要時) ShippingForm.jsp → ConfirmOrder.jsp → OrderActionBean#newOrder?confirmed=true → OrderService#insertOrder[@Transactional] → SequenceMapper#getSequence+updateSequence(SEQUENCE) + ItemMapper#updateInventoryQuantity(INVENTORY) + OrderMapper#insertOrder(ORDERS) + OrderMapper#insertOrderStatus(ORDERSTATUS) + LineItemMapper#insertLineItem(LINEITEM) → ViewOrder.jsp
evidence: OrderActionBean.java:119-135 newOrderForm; OrderActionBean.java:142-164 newOrder; OrderService.java:59-77 @Transactional insertOrder; SequenceMapper.xml:26 SELECT SEQUENCE; ItemMapper.xml:76 UPDATE INVENTORY; OrderMapper.xml:93 INSERT ORDERS; OrderMapper.xml:104 INSERT ORDERSTATUS; LineItemMapper.xml:37 INSERT LINEITEM; Order.java:286-324 initOrder
note: mixed: Stripes設定駆動でURL解決+SpringBean DI+OrderActionBeanからOrderServiceへdirect call+MyBatisでMapperバインド。insertOrderは@Transactionalで在庫更新・注文・注文ステータス・明細を1トランザクション管理。セッション経由でAccountActionBean/CartActionBeanを取得（direct呼出ではなくセッションキー参照）
